dt-option.name: searchBuilder.columns
dt-option.summary: Restrict which columns can be filtered on

type.description: `-type number[]` of the columns that can be filtered. This accepts all of the options of `dt-type DataTable.ColumnSelector` such as class name selector, jQuery pseudo selects and column index selectors.

dt-option.description:
This option is an alias to `-feature searchBuilder.columns`, which should be preferred when using DataTables 2+. It can be used to configure SearchBuilder regardless of how the panes are inserted into the document (`-init layout` or `-button searchBuilder`).
Please refer to the documentation for `-feature searchBuilder.columns` for full details of this option.

example.title: Allow three columns to be filtered on
